java::lang::InstantiationException Class Reference

Inheritance diagram for java::lang::InstantiationException:

Public Member Functions

 InstantiationException ()
 InstantiationException (String s)

Detailed Description

Thrown when an attempt is made to use reflection to build a non-instantiable class (an interface or abstract class).

Author:
Brian Jones
Warren Levy (warrenl@cygnus.com)
